channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Anthropic, Microsoft in talks for AI chip deal after $5 billion investment
item.description: Microsoft has not made the Maia 200 chips available to customers, but they are used in the company's data centers, offering better efficiency than other silicon.

item.title: SpaceX is heavily reliant on Starlink for growth and profit as it marches toward Nasdaq listing
item.description: SpaceX's IPO prospectus underscores the importance of Starlink to the company's operations.

item.title: Trump administration says new EPA rules will save you money at the supermarket. It's not clear they will
item.description: Trump delayed Biden-era EPA refrigerant rules, saying the move will lower grocery costs, though the impact on food prices remains unclear.

item.title: Stock futures rise slightly as S&P 500 looks toward another winning week: Live updates
item.description: Volatility picked up this week as investors wrestled with a sharp rise in long-term Treasury yields.

item.title: BCA says the stock and bond markets 'are on a collision course.' And bonds may win
item.description: Bond investors may come out on top as equity and Treasury markets head for a collision.

item.title: IMAX has held ‘preliminary talks’ with potential buyers, source says
item.description: IMAX has held "preliminary talks" through intermediaries, but no official pitches have been made directly by the company, a source told CNBC.

item.title: Trump postpones AI executive order signing: 'I didn't like certain aspects'
item.description: Trump said that AI is "causing tremendous good," and he was concerned that the executive order "could have been a blocker."

item.title: SpaceX readies 12th test flight of massive Starship rocket as IPO looms
item.description: SpaceX's planned Starship launch follows the company's release of its IPO prospectus, which set the stage for what's likely to be a record offering.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves after hours: Workday, Estee Lauder, Zoom, Take-Two and more
item.description: See which stocks are posting big moves after the bell.

item.title: Meta, Broadcom and others to launch $125 million semiconductor research hub at UCLA
item.description: Broadcom, Meta, Applied Materials, GlobalFoundries and Synopsys are joining forces to launch a $125 million "Semiconductor Hub" at UCLA.

item.title: LIV Golf seeks to raise up to $350 million from investors as post-PIF reality sets in
item.description: LIV Golf is preparing to take its updated business plan and investor pitch on the road as soon as Thursday, in an effort to raise fresh capital.

item.title: Cleveland Cavaliers owner Dan Gilbert turns grief over son’s rare disease into search for a cure
item.description: Dan Gilbert honors his son Nick by funding research into neurofibromatosis, the rare disease that took Nick’s life.

item.title: Workday jumps 14% as it bumps up margin forecast on AI strength
item.description: Workday's CEO says the company is seeing success in artificial intelligence.

item.title: McConnell calls DOJ Trump fund 'utterly stupid, morally wrong' after Blanche meeting
item.description: Critics of the "Anti-Weaponization Fund" fear it will give money to Trump supporters who attacked police defending the U.S. Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021.

item.title: 2-time NASCAR champion Kyle Busch has died at 41, NASCAR says
item.description: Kyle Busch, a two-time Cup Series champion who won more races than anyone across NASCAR's three national series, has died at 41.

item.title: Job training for robots: How China is getting machines ready to join the workforce
item.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk said on the company's fourth-quarter earnings call that China is the biggest competition for humanoid robots.

item.title: Spotify soars 13% after announcing AI music deal with UMG, guidance
item.description: Spotify, which is holding its first investor day in four years, is now under the direction of co-CEOs Gustav Söderström and Alex Norström.

item.title: SpaceX, OpenAI valuations could mean they leapfrog Berkshire Hathaway on first day of trading
item.description: Traders on prediction market Polymarket think SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic on their first day of trading will surpass valuations of at least $1.4 trillion.

item.title: NYC Mayor Mamdani launches Twitch show to answer New Yorkers' questions
item.description: The livestream series will let New Yorkers question Mamdani in real time on Twitch, expanding beyond the early echoes of FDR's fireside chats.

item.title: Prediction markets are fueling a high-stakes brawl between states and federal regulators
item.description: Sixteen states are in legal proceedings against prediction market platforms, while one state has moved to ban them.

item.title: How Walmart's gas price warning shapes our retail outlook — plus, Honeywell's quantum connection
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: Now is the best time to open a gas credit card: Earn up to 15 cents off per gallon or 3X rewards on fuel
item.description: With gas prices rising by over 50% since the end of February, CNBC covers some top co-branded gas cards, as well as more general options.

item.title: Miner Perpetua Resources secures $2.9 billion U.S. loan for Idaho gold, antimony project
item.description: Mining company Perpetua Resources has secured a $2.9 billion loan from the U.S. Export-Import Bank as the U.S. looks to secure access to critical minerals.

item.title: Will Elon Musk eventually merge SpaceX with Tesla? Speculation is building
item.description: Analysts speculate that Elon Musk will merge his two companies but traders on prediction markets are not so certain.

item.title: Trump 'slush fund' a flashpoint as Senate heads home without funding DHS
item.description: GOP tensions over President Donald Trump's DOJ fund derail Senate attempt to pass immigration enforcement funding package.

item.title: An AI trade involving energy and infrastructure that's doubled your money, topping Nvidia
item.description: If you put the same money into a basket of companies that are building out AI infrastructure and energy sources, you’ve done much better than stocks like Nvidia.

item.title: Oil prices fall as investors hope for U.S.-Iran deal
item.description: Iran and the U.S. have made little progress toward a deal since they agreed to fragile ceasefire last month.

item.title: Oura, smart ring maker, files confidentially for IPO
item.description: Oura, the maker of the health and wellness tracking smart ring, has confidentially filed for an IPO with the SEC.

item.title: Stellantis unveils $70 billion turnaround plan, targets positive cash flow by 2027
item.description: Stellantis CEO Antonio Filosa unveiled a new five-year strategic plan Thursday worth 60 billion euros ($69.7 billion).

item.title: There's a buying opportunity in this big U.S. bank, according to the charts
item.description: Jay Woods of Freedom Capital Markets breaks down the technicals on this bank name.
